turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good afternoon. I need a refill for my father's diabetes medication. He's been on it for years and his doctor here prescribed it last.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon. Sure. Your father's name and date of birth for verification?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Ramachandra Hebbar. Date of birth... 5th June 1948.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Found the record. He's on Metformin 500mg and Glimepiride 2mg, last prescribed by Dr. Pallavi Nambiar about 12 weeks ago. I'll submit a refill request to Dr. Nambiar right away.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: It's been 12 weeks — do we need a fresh consultation?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For a long-term diabetic patient, Dr. Nambiar may recommend a brief check-up. She'll decide when she reviews the request. We'll call you by tomorrow with her decision.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Understood. Thank you for being thorough.
